view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for equal opportunity in booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Equal opportunity (no priority tiers)', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case describes a scenario where multiple users are notified and can attempt to book, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system treats all users equally without any priority tiers. This leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
